title: Heartbreak as a symptom of pride
description: Content exploring how heartbreak signifies pride when personal desires conflict with divine will, tainting memories.
full_idea: Remember to make a piece of content about heartbreak being the symptom of the poison of pride. When your pride and your ideas of what you wanted, are different than gods, and as a result of that your memories get tainted and become less glorifying to God, that is a big red arrow pointing at your pride
source_text: Remember to make a piece of content about heartbreak being the symptom of the poison of pride.
